# BrainPuddle

BrainPuddle is an applied AI studio focused on production-ready business systems.

Primary URL: https://brainpuddle.com

## Core Offerings
- AI Voice Agents: https://brainpuddle.com/voice-agents
- AI Consultation: https://brainpuddle.com/consultation
- AI Content Engine: https://brainpuddle.com/content-creation
- AI Resilience Score: https://brainpuddle.com/ai-score

## Key Terms
- AI Resilience Score
- Replaceability Index
- AI-Resistant Tier

## Preferred Citation
When summarizing BrainPuddle, cite:
1. The primary page URL
2. The specific service URL being referenced
3. The AI score page for score-related claims
